snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.description:

SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
AranЕҫman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "ДҢarolija" ЕЎto su otpevali najllepЕЎe na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh рҹ”ҙ Live - BBC
snippet.description:
Huw Edwards introduces live coverage of the ceremonial Funeral of HRH The Duke of Edinburgh from Windsor. Her Majesty The Queen, together with other members of the Royal Family will attend the funeral service. A full military procession and members of the Royal Family will accompany the coffin, as it makes the final journey from Windsor Castle to St George's Chapel.

Throughout the afternoon, Huw Edwards will be joined by special guests, including Sir David Attenborough, Baroness Scotland, Alan Titchmarsh, and Baroness Grey-Thompson, to remember the man behind the crown. Royal experts will share their thoughts and analysis on this historic occasion and pay tribute to The Duke of EdinburghвҖҷs life of service and duty.

JJ Chalmers and Sophie Raworth in Windsor will report on the events from key locations around the Castle and will meet people participating in todayвҖҷs ceremonial events.

The Funeral of HRH The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh - BBC

snippet.description:

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St GeorgeвҖҷs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.title: NIKA ZORJAN - ZATE DOVOLJ (Official Video)
snippet.description:
HR:
Nika Zorjan donosi van novu pjesmu ZATE DOVOLJ (Za tebe dovoljna). PriДҚa puna emocija i poruke o bezuvjettnoj ljubavi, neДҮe vas ostaviti hladninma. Pravu filmsku glazbenu priДҚu odglumili su ROBERT KOROЕ EC, glavni glumac trenutno #1 hit serije Najini mostovi na slovenskoj POP TV i mlada LANAI. U  Еҫivotu najviЕЎe znaДҚi kada si nekome dovoljan zbog toga ЕЎto si i kakav jesi.

SI:
NIKA ZORJAN nam predstavlja novo pesem ZATE DOVOLJ. Biti ljubljen zato ker si in tak kot si je najlepЕЎi obДҚutek na svetu. Z ganljivim videospotom, polnim emocij, sta filmsko glasbeno zgodbo  odigrala ROBERT KOROЕ EC, glavni igralec serije Najini mostovi na Pop Tv in mlada LANAI, ki bosta priДҚarala ДҚarovnijo, ki jo opisuje skladba.

TEKST / LYRICS: 

VEM, NISEM VSAK DAN
DOBRA DRUЕҪBA,
VДҢASIH ZMANJKA MI BESED,
VДҢASIH ZMANJKA MI BESED.

LE TI, TI ME VIDIЕ  V SRCE
IN STOPIЕ  ME KAKOR LED
IN STOPIЕ  ME KAKOR LED.

VEDNO SEM ZATE DOVOLJ,
V MENI VIDIЕ  LE LEPГ“.
IN TI, TI ME NASMEJEЕ , ME OGREJEЕ ,
KO ME POGLEDAЕ , TAKO JE TOPLГ“.

IN ZAME SI TU,
KAKOR SO ZVEZDE NA NEBU.
IN NI, NI LEPЕ EGA, KO VEM, DA LAHKO
ZASPIVA V OBJEMU.

OB TEBI SE NIKOLI NE PRETVARJAM,
TI V PIKO ME POZNAЕ 
IN KAR RABIM, TO MI DAЕ .

VДҢASIH SE UЕ ДҢIPNEM,
KAKO LAHKO TAKO ME RAD IMAЕ ?

VEDNO SEM ZATE DOVOLJ,
V MENI VIDIЕ  LE LEPГ“.
IN TI, TI ME NASMEJEЕ , ME OGREJEЕ ,
KO ME POGLEDAЕ  TAKO JE TOPLГ“.

IN ZAME SI TU,
KAKOR SO ZVEZDE NA NEBU.
IN NI, NI LEPЕ EGA, KO VEM, DA LAHKO
ZASPIVA V OBJEMU.

SEM LJUBJENA.

Music: RAAY
Lyrics: MARJETKA VOVK
Produced & arranged by: RAAY MUSIC, 2021
Video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021

Posebna zahvala:
- OBДҢINA IZOLA
- ROBERT KOROЕ EC
- LANAI Z DRUЕҪINO
- Sanel Bilas / MOEL d.o.o. / Sobe Argo & Sobe Kaki in Kivi
- Moda Mi&Lan z blagovno znamko MORRO

snippet.title: IFSC Boulder World Cup Meiringen 2021 || Men's and women's semi-finals
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Audi RS6 generations DRAG RACE
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? ClickВ https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowВ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

Check this out, RS6 fans - weвҖҷve brought in every generation of the RS6 and they're going head-to-head in an almighty drag race! From the 450hp C5 through to the current 600hp C8, weвҖҷre here to find out just how these four generations of RS6 perform over the quarter-mile. 

As youвҖҷd expect, MatвҖҷs in his long term RS6, the C8. With a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 under the bonnet, it can produce 600hp & 800Nm of torque. Alongside him, weвҖҷve got Yianni in the C7. It may be powered by the same size engine as the C8, however, it can produce slightly more power (605hp), although itвҖҷs also slightly down on torque (750Nm). 

The C6 may be several years older, but when you consider itвҖҷs powered by a 5-litre twin-turbo V10, itвҖҷs surely got to be in with a shout, right? Or perhaps the C5, with its 4.2-litre twin-turbo V8, could spring a surprise? 

All we know is, thereвҖҷs only one way to find outвҖҰ LETвҖҷS RACE!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Skip & Shannon react to Luka Doncic's 'lucky' game-winning shot against Grizzlies | NBA | UNDISPUTED
snippet.description:
Even during an eventful night of impressive NBA performances, Luka Doncic still stole the show. With one point eight seconds left and the Dallas Mavericks down two to the Memphis Grizzlies, Luka received the inbounds pass before splitting a double team, stumbling and somehow getting the shot off and draining it. After the game, Luka was pretty honest saying he was surprised when it went in considering he didnвҖҷt see the rim when he released it, and he called it quote, 'kinda lucky.' Hear what Skip Bayless and Shannon Sharpe have to say about Luka's lucky shot.

#Undisputed #NBA #LukaDoncic #DallasMavericks #MemphisGrizzlies

snippet.title: Farma VukoviДҮ ima ovna s najveДҮim rogovima
snippet.description:
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join
Farma VukoviДҮ iz Potkraja kod Travnika slovi za jednu od najveДҮih i najsuvremenijih u kantonu SrediЕЎnja Bosna. Kontinuirano ulaЕҫu u genetski razvoj stada, suvremene strojeve koji olakЕЎavaju rad na farmi te obradu zapuЕЎtenih njiva i livada. Vlasnik Drago VukoviДҮ izgradio je poslovnu filozofiju koja se temelji na domaДҮim resursima. ViЕЎe od 90 posto hrane za svoj stoДҚni fond Drago proizvodi sa domaДҮih njiva koje su nekada bile zapuЕЎtene i zarasle u korov. Danas sa iste zemlje ubire Еҫitarice, djetelinu i sijeno vrhunske kvalitete. ViЕЎe pogledajte u prilogu.

snippet.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
snippet.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

Here are the nesting dolls I have (affiliate links):

The one I painted last time: https://amzn.to/2A4LzXyвҖӢ
The one I painted this time: https://amzn.to/375JM0EвҖӢ
*make sure to tag me on instagram if you paint your own!!!

*LAST CHANCE for the Rubik's Cube pre-order. Don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

localized.title: Customizing a JUMBO Nesting Doll Set
localized.description:
Hey guys! Today I am going to be painting on and customizing a set of Russian nesting dolls (or matryoshka dolls). Ever since I painted on my firt set of dolls, you guys have been requesting that I do it again, so I was really excited to finally decorate these and add my own style to them. It's a different type of doll customization haha. This was a really fun art project to do, I highly recommend it if you are looking for creative activities to do. There is so much potential to do all kinds of different characters with these and create a completely original set. 

These are really awesome collectibles and make for such cool home decor. I could definitely see myself building a collection of them. They're also really fun to take apart and put back together lol

snippet.title: Chonkers Off-Road Tires Arrive To The Fortnite Island
snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: 'Non-paper' o podjeli BiH: Reakcije ДҚlanova PredsjedniЕЎtva
snippet.description:
Sva tri ДҚlana PredsjedniЕЎtva Bosne i Hercegovine reagovala su na tekst slovenskog portala "Necenzurisano" koji je objavio "non-paper" koji je navodno Vlada Slovenije uputila u Brisel, a koji predviД‘a podjelu Bosne i Hercegovine.

ЕҪeljko KomЕЎiДҮ, koji je ranije potvrdio da je aktuelni predsednik Slovenije Borut Pahor pitao da li je moguДҮ miran razlaz u Bosni i Hercegovini, poruДҚio je da su ideje koje su predstavljene u tom dokumentu nuД‘ene i prije rata, pa se na njih nije pristalo.

Е efik DЕҫaferoviДҮ kaЕҫe da ne zna odakle dokument dolazi, ali da njegovo prisustvo u medijima predstavlja dovoljan znak za uzbunu. Dodaje i da se ovo moЕҫe tumaДҚiti kao vid pritiska i lobiranja u pogledu izmjene izbornog zakona i ograniДҚenih ustavnih promjena.

PredsjedavajuДҮi PredsjedniЕЎtva BiH Milorad Dodik u Beogradu je poruДҚio da pitanje mirnog razlaza ili rata ne zavisi od domaДҮih aktera, veДҮ iskljuДҚivo od SAD-a. Dodaje i da ДҮe Srbija sve viЕЎe morati da bude involvirana u unutraЕЎnja pitanja BiH.

#BiH

snippet.title: Building Thumb Bucket Ep 2 (Berms, rollers, and singletrack!)
snippet.description:
Thumb bucket is Berm Peak's first machine cut mountain bike trail, which when finished will be a blank canvas for crazy features. This series documents us building the trail from bottom to top, from learning how to use a machine, to drainage, to technical difficulties.

Check out Squatch's YouTube Channel https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFpcbXL6wsGrQhUDQgvOGCQ

Check out Joe's YouTube Channel 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCccgqHpyg6ax6dLzBx9yZGA

Berm Peak Hoodies, Beanies, Jerseys, Shirts
https://cognativemtb.com/collections/seths-bike-hacks-collection

Check out our second channel for "express" videos https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCOpP5PqrzODWpFU961acUbg

Instagram https://www.instagram.com/sethsbikehacks
Facebook https://www.facebook.com/sethsbikehacks

Music in this video is from 
http://share.epidemicsound.com/trQSg
and https://soundstripe.com?fpr=seth20

Support Berm Park! The free public bike park that YOU can ride! Join my Patreon and 100% of the proceeds go towards funding this. Construction is underway right now! 
Learn more here https://www.patreon.com/sethsbikehacks
Video explaining Berm Parkhttps://youtu.be/lZLE6zB-uuI

Advertising disclosure: All of these videos contain products, logos, or mentions associated with Diamondback Bicycles. Whether or not the video itself was sponsored by Diamondback, they do support this channel, and by extension, every video on it.

snippet.title: Film Theory: Did Disney STEAL Finding Nemo?
snippet.description:
Never miss a Film Theory! в–ә http://bit.ly/1dI8VBHВ  В 

Disney is infamous for keeping a tight hold on it's copyright, including taking it to extremes with things that TECHNICALLY fall under public domain in their original format. Well, that is not what happened with Finding Nemo. You see, the story of Finding Nemo is VERY similar to a not as well known children's story. One that is NOT in the public domain. Today, Theorists, we are going to dive deep and figure out if Disney actually STOLE the story of Finding Nemo!

Get yourself some Theory Wear! в–әВ https://bit.ly/3bZzn9t
Don't miss a Film Theory! в–ә http://bit.ly/1dI8VBH В 

#FindingNemo #Pixar #Disney #Disney+ #DisneyTheory #PixarTheory #Theory #FilmTheory #Matpat

But the problem is, if you donвҖҷt understand what you are looking at or the opportunity that is before you, then you will botch it up. snippet.title: Emanet 160. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 160 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#shorts

snippet.title: GIGANTIC Bitcoin Pump Incoming (BNB, XRP, ETH Lead Altcoin Super Cycle)
snippet.description:
Today we will talk about some gigantic altcoin moves this week from XRP, BNB, & ETH. Is Ethereum poised to finally go above $2500? WeвҖҷll discuss the possibility of China using Bitcoin as a weapon and the latest cryptocurrency news. The upcoming Coinbase IPO will most likely have a HUGE effect on the market, but are we seeing this effect already?

This month we have some really big news coming for ETH. Find out what this Ethereum news is and why institutional demand is on the rise. As Binance Coin establishes itself as the #3 coin, can it ever catch up to ETH? Can it even hold the #3 spot as XRP comes in hot?

snippet.title: What Color Is My Hoodie?
snippet.description:
Grey? Blue? Purple? It can look different, depending on the context. Let's talk about color perception, color temperature, and the history of laundry.

Atmospheric opacity image from ESA/Hubble (F. Granato): https://www.eso.org/public/images/atm_opacity/ - image licensed under CC by 4.0 - https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/

The optical illusion is original, but based on the work of David Novick: https://twitter.com/novickprof/status/1139342022551191553

More on Illuminant D65: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Illuminant_D65 - the references in this article go into the full technical detail

I'm at https://tomscott.com
on Twitter at https://twitter.com/tomscott
on Facebook at https://facebook.com/tomscott
and on Instagram as tomscottgo

snippet.title: Luka Doncic Is FRUSTRATED! This Is Why
snippet.description:
The NBA is buzzing right now over this unbelievable one handed floater from downtown for the win at the buzzer.
However even with this miraculous win, the Mavs are still in the play in zone. And the format itself is actually completely changed for this year.
And Luka Doncic is not happy about it at all. Let me explain. What up everybody my name is Stefan and this is Heat Check. LetвҖҷs get into it.
Going over the tournament changes first, last year the 8 and 9 seed which were the Blazers and the Grizzlies were within 4 games of each other so they faced off before the playoffs.
Portland as the better seeded team had the advantage of needing just 1 win, while Memphis needed 2 in a row. Dame and CJ sealed the deal in the first game and got in the playoffs.
This season tho, the teams that are 7 through 10 will have a play in regardless of if theyвҖҷre more or less than 4 games in the standings.
Also, contrary to popular belief, the games will not be played like this. 7 vs 10 and 8 vs 9. 
Not at all. The NBA made this super complicated so let me give you a practical example as if the play-in started today.
Actually the format is such that 7 plays 8 and 9 plays 10 in a single elimination game. 
The winner of the higher seeded matchup will go straight to the playoffs as number 7.
The loser however will get a second chance as an award for their better record than the bottom 2 squads.
And speaking of them 9 and 10 will battle and the team that fails in this game is eliminated and goes home, while the winner plays another deciding game against the team that lost in that higher seeded matchup. And then finally the better team gets the last place in the playoffs.
I promise youвҖҷre not getting a better explanation anywhere online, so if youвҖҷre still confused, blame the NBA and just re-watch this video. Ok letвҖҷs now get to Luka.
Recently in a postgame interview Doncic voiced his frustration and disagreement with how the format is set up.
Mark Cuban was quick to support his star player and this point of view with his own remarks calling the tournament an enormous mistake and saying that it doubles the stress that players and teams are already feeling because of the compressed schedule.
Now look, on 1 side itвҖҷs great for both us the fans, that we get to see some extra drama even before the playoffs. That Portland vs Memphis game last year was crazy. 
Also, it gives bottom teams something to play for instead of resorting to tanking in the second half of the season. Look at this. In the east the 13 place Cleveland are just 2 games out of it right now. They have a lot to fight for.
But on the other hand, I do understand Luka and you canвҖҷt give a 10 seed that big of a chance to where they could suck for the entire season, but then win 2 in a row and go straight to the playoffs. 
Anyway, itвҖҷs clear that these are just measurements that are implemented to combat the shortened schedule and everything else that happened in this unprecedented situation.
IвҖҷm sure that when all this settles and we have a full and normal season, the league would be able to find a sustainable solution thatвҖҷs gonna be fair for all teams that are in playoff contention.
Until then, youвҖҷll have to live with my explanation of the format. ThatвҖҷs it for now, subscribe and talk to you in the next one. Peace out.

snippet.title: Emanet 157. BГ¶lГјm FragmanДұ | Legacy Episode 157 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: rebirthing : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
вҖңIвҖҷve had a lot of lives вҖ“ like my cat, IвҖҷm on my ninth life.вҖқ 
Demi LovatoвҖҷs explosive documentary series comes to a close with revelations about her broken engagement, her return to the studio, and exploration of moderation sobriety as she attempts to let go of her past and moves ahead living her truth. 

Resources:
 
The National Eating Disorders Association (NEDA) helpline
1-800-931-2237 (they also offer click-to-chat messaging) 
www.nationaleatingdisorders.org
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
Love Is Respect. Love is more than just the way you feel. Text loveis to 22522 for support and help understanding healthy relationships.
www.loveisrespect.org
1-866-331-9474
TTY 1-866-331-8453
Text: loveis to 22522
Chat Online: www.loveisrespect.org
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

 
Find resources for your path to recovery at the Recovery Resource Hub (https://www.recoveryresourcehub.org/).

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

snippet.title: Customizing Many Shoes.
snippet.description:
Hey Guys! Today I am going to be painting and customizing multiple pairs of some plain white vans. Shoes are such a fun item to paint, and I have so many ideas for ways to decorate these. I hope I give you some inspiration for a fun painting project! I love making custom shoes because you can really put your own style on them and make them personal to you (even if you never actually wear them lol). This is always such a cool, creative and easy activity to do if you're bored or need to get over artist's block. You can even use this technique to up cycle some old shoes!

*The Rubik's Cube pre-order is still ON! But it ends soon, don't miss out!*
PRE-ORDER THE LIMITED EDITION RUBIK'S CUBE:
https://www.moriah-rubiks.com/

SUPPLIES I USED (contains affiliate links):
Angelus Leather Paint (big bottles): https://amzn.to/2QzjUmGвҖӢ
Angelus Leather Paint (small bottles): https://amzn.to/2U5gmuoвҖӢ
Vinyl Red Tape: https://amzn.to/2WHjhLRвҖӢ
High Gloss Acrylic Finisher: https://amzn.to/2J4mCwc


___________WELCOME TO MY CHANNEL__________

Hey! my name is Moriah (pronounced muh-rye-yuh рҹҳӮ ) and this is my channel....obviously. I'm 26 and like doing anything creative...and being snarky.....just a lil. I make a lot of decorating, painting and general art videos here. I'm obsessed with editing and adding lil bits to my videos, so if that's not your thing....oof you may hate this haha. I paint on squishies, thrift store finds, and other random things I pick up. I also love to draw, but don't expect anything too skilled, I'm not the best at that haha. You will also find occasional crafting/testing crafting kits on my channel which are always a hot mess. And even some baking (REALLY bad at that, but it's fun to try LOL). 

CURRENT SERIES:
Squishy Makeovers: Fixing and decorating used squishies sent from my viewers
Thrift Store Makeovers: Fixing and decorating stuff I find at thrift stores/yard sales
Bake With ME: Recreating squishies I've decorated in real life
Create This Book: Drawing in the prompt book that I wrote (available to purchase and follow along)
Squishy Unboxing: Opening used squishy packages sent from viewers
Craft Kit Testing: pretty self explanatory. testing craft kits.

Find Products I Use (contains affiliate links):
https://a.co/4XDtrmV


___UPLOAD SCHEDULE___

Every Friday at 4:00pm ET: Alternating Squishy Makeovers, Thrift Makeovers, Craft Kit Reviews, Create This Book, Mail Openings and Miscellaneous crafts and DIYs


____PURCHASE ME PRODUCTS____

CREATE THIS BOOK:
https://amzn.to/2vUerfI

CREATE THIS BOOK 2:
https://amzn.to/2Nx2G9f

ME Custom Merchandise:
https://moriahelizabethmerch.com/

ME Pin & Sticker Shop:
https://me-merch.myshopify.com

ME Printed Apparel and Accessories:
https://moriah-elizabeth.teespring.com/


____ME SOCIALS____

INSTAGRAM: 
https://www.instagram.com/moriahelizabethofficial/

TIKTOK:
https://www.tiktok.com/@me.moriah.elizabeth

FACEBOOK:
https://www.facebook.com/Moriah-Elizabeth-102592864903627

SNAPCHAT:
MoriahOfficial

VISIT ME WEBSITE:
https://www.moriahelizabeth.com/


____CONTACT ME____

EMAIL PICTURES OF YOUR ART (Create This Book or Fan art only please):
Artwork@Moriah.video

FOR BUSINESS INQUIRIES/OPPORTUNITIES ONLY:
moriah@nightmedia.co


_____MAIL ME_____

For sending squishies, Letters, or general fan mail, please contact: FANMAIL@MORIAH.VIDEO to request my P.O. box address 
(must be 13+ to send mail)
ATTENTION: Unfortunately I can only respond to a small amount of people each week. This is to make sure that I get a reasonable amount of mail and can feature the maximum amount on camera. I apologize in advance if you do not hear back from me, I may not have even seen the message. This email gets SUPER clogged with thousands of messages. Currently have 15,000+ unread messages just in this folder. SORRY PEEPS!*

snippet.title: The National Debt: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver (HBO)
snippet.description:
The national debt has long been portrayed as a burden weвҖҷre placing on future generations. John Oliver discusses how national debt works, why people are so concerned about it, and why it might be more helpful that you think. 

Connect with Last Week Tonight online...

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for вҖңMr. Perfectly FineвҖқ (TaylorвҖҷs Version) (From The Vault) вҖ“ off her upcoming Fearless (TaylorвҖҷs Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

в–әSubscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
в–әExclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

в–әFollow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

в–әFollow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. IвҖҷve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that youвҖҷre okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesnвҖҷt look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess youвҖҷre all the same
Because I hear heвҖҷs got his arm вҖҳround a brand new girl
IвҖҷve been picking up my heart
HeвҖҷs been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But itвҖҷs wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
ItвҖҷs the best seat
In the best room
Oh, heвҖҷs so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And itвҖҷs really such a shame
ItвҖҷs such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now IвҖҷm Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe youвҖҷll miss me
But by then youвҖҷll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
HowвҖҷs your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
IвҖҷve been Miss misery for the last time
And youвҖҷre Mr. perfectly fine
YouвҖҷre perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

snippet.title: The coolest phone I've ever broken - Legion Duel Phone 2
snippet.description:
Gaming phones are some of the coolest phones ever. This Legion Duel Phone 2 is definitely one of the coolest. Literally... with its two fans. Its pretty cool. Inside and outside. But is it durable? The Legion duel phone 2 is heavy, but its also oddly shaped... The only way to find out for sure is with a durability test. Remember, durability is not the only factor to consider when picking out your next phone. A good case will solve all structural issues. 

More info on the Legion Duel 2 here: https://www.lenovo.com/gb/en/phones/lenovo/legion-phone-duel/Legion-Phone-Duel-2/p/PPIPPIZ7081

Teardown Video HERE: https://youtu.be/iVixsjxdwCs

snippet.title: GUH - POCEO OD NULE (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/guhsajan/
Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Muzika i Tekst: GUH
AranЕҫman: @jonezr
Mix i Master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @jovanradoviic
Directed by: GUH, @jovanradoviic
Video Edit & Post Production: @jovanradoviic
https://www.instagram.com/jovanradoviicвҖӢвҖӢ

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

snippet.title: Bailey & Asa's PROPOSAL Video вқӨпёҸ
snippet.description:
Watch as Asa PROPOSES to Bailey after they dated for over four years! He planned this all on his own, with some covert help from Brooklyn, family and friends. Bailey had no idea. What was your favorite part of the proposal? SUBSCRIBE and COMMENT BELOW!

вң… Here is the ring Asa chose for Bailey from James Allen: рҹ‘үрҹҸ» https://bit.ly/3gacwM5

вң… Be sure to follow us on Instagram to see MORE PROPOSAL PHOTOS and Stories! рҹ‘үрҹҸ» https://www.instagram.com/BrooklynAndBailey

I met Asa met five years ago WAY BACK in 2016 when I was only 16 and he was 15. I didnвҖҷt know it then, but I had just met my future husband! It took a year of him pursuing me, and me constantly putting him in the FRIEND ZONE, before I realized what a catch he really was! On Feb 25, 2017, Asa and I officially started dating, ending the day with my very first kiss! You can watch that video, HERE: https://youtu.be/FsI8KtveD3A (yвҖҷall prob know that storyрҹҳү)

In the beginning of this proposal video, there is a small outtake taken when Brooklyn and I were filming our music video for Simple Things in May, 2017. In that moment, Brooklyn and my mom had put Asa up to the task of pranking me with a fake wedding ring and proposal! Little did I know then that four years later Asa would be the one to OFFICIALLY propose to me... and I wouldn't have it ANY. OTHER. WAY! 

As Asa walked me out to where he planned to propose, I started bawling my eyes out when I figured out what was going on... I literally had NO clue! The date 4/3/21 will forever be a day to remember for the both of us.вқӨпёҸ It might seem small to you, but it was like even the world was counting down for us! 

IвҖҷm so glad I got to say YES to my forever! (IвҖҷm still having a hard time remembering to call Asa my fiancГ© instead of boyfriend LOL!)

рҹ’Ӣ's -Bailey

PS~ Special thanks to Lizzy McAlpine for lending us the use of her unreleased music, to our friend Antoine for taking photos and video, and Kamri for editing this proposal video! And be sure to check back NEXT WEEK for a longer BTS vlog of EVERYTHING leading up to the proposal!
__

рҹ’ҝрҹҺ¶  Music Track: No Name (unreleased title)
Artist: Lizzy McAlpine
Website: рҹ‘үрҹҸ» https://lizzymcalpine.com/

This is an unreleased rendition of Lizzy's beautiful song "Andrew", that was rearranged specifically for this video. This track is as the end of Andrew. You can find all of Lizzy's music, including Andrew, on her website (link above)! 

You should also SUBSCRIBE to Lizzy's YouTube channel, HERE! рҹ‘үрҹҸ» https://www.youtube.com/c/LizzyMcAlpine
_

Where else can YOU FIND US???

   рҹ“ё  Instagram | http://instagram.com/brooklynandbailey
   вҸ°  Tik Tok | @BrooklynAndBailey
   рҹҗҘ  Twitter | http://twitter.com/brookandbailey
   рҹ‘Ө  Facebook | http://facebook.com/brooklynandbailey
   рҹ‘»  SnapChat | http://snapchat.com/add/BrookAndBailey
   рҹҺ¶  Spotify | https://open.spotify.com/artist/4Y8tcJEqYuIDSNAZEqu9Nd
   вҳҒпёҸ  SoundCloud | http://soundcloud.com/brooklynandbailey
_

Brooklyn & Bailey have run their own YouTube channel since March 2013, but have appeared on YouTube on their mom's CuteGirlsHairstyles channel since early 2008. So, these twins have pretty much grown up with you on YouTube! Both are currently seniors at Baylor University, studying Entrepreneurship and living life to the fullest. If you love all things twins, including lifestyle and advice videos, informative product reviews and hauls, as well as hilarious skits... then be sure to SUBSCRIBE to this channel!
_

snippet.title: New Mercedes EQS REVIEW & tested 0-60mph - is it as quick as a Tesla?
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? ClickВ https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowВ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

This is the all-new Mercedes EQS!

ItвҖҷs MercedesвҖҷ answer to the Tesla Model S and Porsche Taycan, and we think it might be one of the best-looking EVs weвҖҷll see all year! 

For starters, it more than looks the partвҖҰ But then again, would you expect anything else from what's effectively an all-electric S-Class? WhatвҖҷs more, the performance stats are more than good enough. Powered by dual-electric motors, the EQS can deliver 523hp & 835Nm of torque! Not only that, but with an 108kWh battery pack hidden under the surface, it can also apparently provide you with 478 miles of range.

Ok so it may be a bit down compared to the Model S Plaid+, but let's face it, most electric cars will be! However, we think thereвҖҷs one area where the EQS has the Tesla beatвҖҰ The interior! Not only will you find high-quality materials throughout the cabin, up-front the dashboard is dominated by the Mercedes Hyperscreen, with a HUGE 18-inch touchscreen down the middle which is flanked by two 12-inch displays! 

Surely the Hyperscreen is enough to convert you to an EV fanboy, right?! There's only one way to find out... Join Mat for this all-new review!

.............................................................

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moЕҫete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak priДҚe o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" priДҚa o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaЕЎa ДҚiji postupci se i dan danas prepriДҚavaju. Na ДҚelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Еҫestokih momaka sa naЕЎih prostora, zaДҚetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaЕЎ, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. PraviДҚan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reЕЎavao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anД‘eo ДҚuvar dok je za ove druge bio noДҮna mora, a gnev i jaДҚinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odliДҚno pamtili. ЕҪivotni put Ljubomira MagaЕЎa i druЕҫine koju je okupio oko sebe, moЕҫe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriЕҫnih deДҚaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovДҚega. SaznaДҮemo na koje sve skrivene i javne naДҚine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogaД‘aja iz njegovog Еҫivota. ДҢuДҮemo i svedoДҚanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristiДҚkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naЕЎ sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoЕҫete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

#dosije #masanlekic #PRVA

snippet.title: Binging with Babish: Chicken Fingers from Community
snippet.description:
During my weekly re-watching of Community, I was reminded that an entire episode was dedicated to the study group's Goodfellian pursuit of chicken fingers. Needing a break after last week's culinary marathon, I jumped at the opportunity to brine some tendies in pickle juice just to see what happens. Turns out, it tastes real good! Thanks Greendale!

Recipe: https://www.bingingwithbabish.com/recipes/chicken-fingers-community

Music: "Juparo" by Broke for Free
https://soundcloud.com/broke-for-free

My playlist of preferred cooking tunes, Bangers with Babish!
https://spoti.fi/2TYXmiY

snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/-help-me-carwowвҖӢ and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!
.............................................................

HowвҖҷs this for an all-new epic drag race! 

WeвҖҷve got Mat in the all-new BMW M4, and heвҖҷs lining up alongside the Mercedes-AMG C63 S & Audi RS5!

So how do they match up? First up we've got the M4, and under the bonnet youвҖҷll find a 3-litre straight-six which can deliver 510hp & 660Nm of torque. 

As for the AMG, well itвҖҷs not too different. It may have a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 instead, but it can also deliver 510hp, coupled with 700Nm. Finally we have the RS5, which has a 2.9-litre V6 which can put down 450hp and 600Nm of torque. 

Think the Audi is the underdog? Well it has one key benefit - Quattro AWD! As for both the BMW and AMG? Well, they've only got RWD! Will that make the difference? YouвҖҷll have to keep watching to find out!

Check out our German YouTube channel - https://www.youtube.com/carwow-Deutschland
.............................................................

snippet.title: Glitterbomb Trap Catches Phone Scammer (who gets arrested)
snippet.description:
I glitterbombed my way up the scammer chain of command.  Come join me in my Creative Engineering class!! https://Monthly.com/MarkRober

If you suspect that you or a loved one has been the victim of fraud, you can call or visit the National Elder Fraud hotline (https://stopelderfraud.ovc.ojp.gov/)  at 833-372-8311 and report it to the FTC by visiting the agencyвҖҷs website (https://reportfraud.ftc.gov/#/) or calling 877-382-4357.

Go watch JimвҖҷs video to see how he located the scammers and subscribe to his channel- 
https://youtu.be/Xvjjpzyiig4

Go check out Perog's version here too- 
https://youtu.be/J4mkZU2Y0as

New music this time from the talented Laura Shigihara- https://open.spotify.com/track/1zOzvy6SeVJs2MEET7vyCW?si=f3fee98828fa4802

snippet.title: The Secret of Synchronization
snippet.description:
How does order spontaneously arise out of chaos? This video is sponsored by Kiwico вҖ” go to https://www.kiwico.com/Veritasium50 for 50% off your first month of any crate.

An enormous thanks to Prof. Steven Strogatz вҖ” this video would not have been possible without him. Much of the script-writing was inspired and informed by his wonderful book Sync, and his 2004 TED talk. He is a giant in this field, and has literally written the book on chaos, complexity, and synchronization. It was hard to find a paper in this field that Steven (or one of his students) didn't contribute to. His Podcast "The Joy of X" is wonderful вҖ” please listen and subscribe wherever you get your podcasts https://www.quantamagazine.org/tag/the-joy-of-x

Nicky Case's Amazing Firefly Interactive вҖ” https://ncase.me/fireflies

Great Kuramoto Model Interactive вҖ” https://www.complexity-explorables.org/explorables/ride-my-kuramotocycle

References: 

Strogatz, S. H. (2012). Sync: How order emerges from chaos in the universe, nature, and daily life. Hachette UK. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Sync

Strogatz, S. H. (2000). From Kuramoto to Crawford: exploring the onset of synchronization in populations of coupled oscillators. Physica D: Nonlinear Phenomena, 143(1-4), 1-20. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Strogatz2000

Goldsztein, G. H., Nadeau, A. N., & Strogatz, S. H. (2021). Synchronization of clocks and metronomes: A perturbation analysis based on multiple timescales. Chaos: An Interdisciplinary Journal of Nonlinear Science, 31(2), 023109. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Goldsztein

The Broughton Suspension Bridge and the Resonance Disaster вҖ” https://ve42.co/Broughton

Bennett, M., Schatz, M. F., Rockwood, H., & Wiesenfeld, K. (2002). Huygens's clocks. Proceedings of the Royal Society of London. Series A: Mathematical, Physical and Engineering Sciences, 458(2019), 563-579. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Bennett2002

Pantaleone, J. (2002). Synchronization of metronomes. American Journal of Physics, 70(10), 992-1000. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Pantaleone2002

Kuramoto, Y. (1975). Self-entrainment of a population of coupled non-linear oscillators. In International symposium on mathematical problems in theoretical physics (pp. 420-422). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. -- https://ve42.co/Kuramoto1975

Great video by Minute Earth about Tidal Locking and the Moon вҖ” https://ve42.co/MinuteEarth

Strogatz, S. H., Abrams, D. M., McRobie, A., Eckhardt, B., & Ott, E. (2005). Crowd synchrony on the Millennium Bridge. Nature, 438(7064), 43-44. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Strogatz2005

Zhabotinsky, A. M. (2007). Belousov-zhabotinsky reaction. Scholarpedia, 2(9), 1435. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Zhabotinsky2007

Flavio H Fenton et al. (2008) Cardiac arrhythmia. Scholarpedia, 3(7):1665. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cardiac

Cherry, E. M., & Fenton, F. H. (2008). Visualization of spiral and scroll waves in simulated and experimental cardiac tissue. New Journal of Physics, 10(12), 125016. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Tyson, J. J. (1994). What everyone should know about the Belousov-Zhabotinsky reaction. In Frontiers in mathematical biology (pp. 569-587). Springer, Berlin, Heidelberg. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Tyson1994

Winfree, A. T. (2001). The geometry of biological time (Vol. 12). Springer Science & Business Media. вҖ” https://ve42.co/Winfree2001

Special thanks to Patreon supporters: Mac Malkawi, Oleksii Leonov, Michael Schneider, Jim Osmun, Tyson McDowell, Ludovic Robillard, jim buckmaster, fanime96, Juan Benet, Ruslan Khroma, Robert Blum, Richard Sundvall, Lee Redden, Vincent, Lyvann Ferrusca, Alfred Wallace, Arjun Chakroborty, Joar Wandborg, Clayton Greenwell, Pindex, Michael Krugman, Cy 'kkm' K'Nelson, Sam Lutfi, Ron Neal

Written by Derek Muller and Petr Lebedev
Animation by Fabio Albertelli and Jakub Misiek
GFX and 3D animation by Jonny Hyman
Filmed by Derek Muller and Raquel Nuno
Edited by Derek Muller
Additional video supplied by Getty Images
Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci

More footage from NASA's Scientific Visualization Studio

100 metronome video from https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=suxu1bmPm2g

Intro animation by Jorge Cham

Thanks for the BZ footage from SteinbockGroup: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IJn1ssZEyns and 
NileRed https://youtu.be/LL3kVtc-4vY

Animation of waves in the heart from The Virtual Heart/ EM Cherry/ FH Fenton вҖ” https://ve42.co/Cardiac and https://ve42.co/Cherry2008

Chemical materials and protocol provided by Mike Morris and the UCI Chemistry Outreach Program https://www.chem.uci.edu/~jsnowick/outreach/UCI_Outreach/index.html

Thanks to Alie Ward for title/thumbnail consultation
Thanks to Dr Juliette Becker and Dr James O'Donoghue for the planetary science help

Music from Jonny Hyman, Epidemic Sound https://epidemicsound.com "Seaweed" "Deeper Than The Ocean" "Ripple Effect"
Music also from Artlist https://artlist.com "Children of Mystery"

Thumbnail by Ignat Berbeci
